variables.task: Propose and implement a safe readability improvement for index.html.

parallel.prompt: Task: {{task}} Return a conservative implementation candidate with low regression risk and explicit affected files.
Task: {{task}} Return a high-novelty candidate while preserving gameplay readability and core identity.

steps.prompt: Use these parallel exploration results to produce one merged implementation plan: {{parallelResultsJson}}. Keep it minimal and auditable.
Implement the merged plan for this repo. Make the smallest coherent set of edits. Respond with JSON actions only.
Audit implementation for {{task}} using kernel Intent -> Admissibility -> Coverage -> Integrity -> Evidence -> Stop/Recover. Use audit target {{auditTarget}}.
Recover from failure. Last status: {{lastStatus}}. Last output: {{lastOutput}}. Apply minimum repair and return JSON actions only.
